lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there, you mentioned something about creating monsters...?

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Good! I gain know from alchemists and builders. Me make beings.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting. Tell me if I'm right. By the alchemists and builders creating you, you have inherited their combined knowledge in much the same way that a child might inherit the looks of their parents.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Inspect symbol of life altars around dungeon. You see item give. Use item on altar. Activate altar to create, you fight.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: You no haveee the two materials need.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: You haveee materials need. Here goes!
